remarks: Welcome to 123 Harbor Drive - a sophisticated 2-bedroom, 2-bath residence offering an exceptional waterfront lifestyle. Freshly painted and thoughtfully updated with new hardware throughout, the home captures a light-filled, airy elegance with a refined coastal aesthetic. Sun-drenched interiors highlight a spacious open-concept living and dining area with an effortless flow, creating an inviting setting for both everyday living and entertaining, with direct access to a private deck-perfect for enjoying your morning coffee or unwinding with a glass of wine overlooking the water. The well-designed kitchen integrates seamlessly into the main living space. Both bedrooms are thoughtfully designed as private en-suite retreats, including a generously proportioned primary suite with a walk-in closet. The second en-suite bedroom is equally well-appointed, featuring a spacious closet and a sense of privacy and comfort, ideal for guests, a home office, or flexible living space. Additional highlights include in-unit laundry, excellent storage, separate garage and a functional layout designed for comfort and ease. A 40' boat dock is available for separate purchase, offering a rare opportunity to complement this coastal lifestyle with direct water access. Perfectly situated near shopping, dining, transportation, and marina amenities, this residence offers a seamless blend of convenience, tranquility, and coastal sophistication.
